notes: Golden set (fixtures/golden/summaries.json) has 50 hand-labeled entries, not the 100 named in the v2.2 roadmap KM #258 -- expanding to 100 would require labeling 50 more documents by hand (labeling_method: hand-labeled by reading actual document content from DB), which was not done this session.

Of the 50 golden entries, 20 have a matching SUMMARISED RegulatoryDocument with summary_json in the dev DB (the other 30 golden entries reference documents that were never run through F2 in this dev environment).
Results are therefore identical to the Day 18 baseline (evals/baseline_report.json) computed on the first 30 entries -- the additional 20 golden entries (31-50) all fall in the summaries_missing set.
Faithfulness 0.783 clears the Week 3 target (>=0.75) but remains below the Day 45 target (>=0.85), consistent with docs/Product-Roadmap-3-6-12.md and docs/Case-Study-v1.md.
